title: A New Direction for Colombia and Implications for U.S. Policy
text:

A New Direction for Colombia and Implications for U.S. Policy
The Warcast
Roxanna Vigil and Kerry Anderson
June 26, 2026

Sign up now and start listening to "The Warcast!"Already a member? Sign In to have access to our podcasts

Episode Notes:
In a June 21 election in Colombia, right-wing candidate Abelardo de la Espriella won the presidency. Kerry talks with Roxanna Vigil about what his victory means for Colombia and U.S. policy in the region. They wrap up with an update on Venezuela.
